band_rationale: Low: a half-authored template (unfilled placeholder title, TODO acceptance, unresolved auth decision) must fail the default 70 gate decisively, so the ceiling is 60; floor 30 asserts the engine still credits the sections that do exist. Engine output at labeling time: 46.
note: Unresolved clarification markers, placeholders, and a TODO instead of acceptance criteria. The extras are genuine secondary defects (no Edge Cases section; 'Login should work well' is unmeasurable), labeled so they count toward precision without being this case's point.
